case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. CRISTIAN CANALES BANOS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED SEP-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BANOS, CRISTIAN CANALES
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/18/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,075.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BANOS, CRISTIAN CANALES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BANOS, CRISTIAN CANALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRISTIAN CANALES BANOS IS NOT PRESENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT ARE SWORN IN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANOS, CRISTIAN CANALES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BANOS, CRISTIAN CANALES
